message:
fix(buffer): add PendingGuard to prevent panic-induced pending count leak

The BufferFuture state machine uses mem::replace to set state to Done
before processing. If inner.poll_ready, inner.call, or future.poll
panics, the Drop impl sees Done and skips the pending-count decrement,
permanently leaking a buffer slot. After capacity such panics, the
buffer becomes permanently full.

Add a PendingGuard RAII struct that decrements pending and wakes waiters
on drop. The guard is defused when state is successfully restored.

Closes asupersync-2tcci.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
